summary: Iteration 10 testing complete. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). All 6 new accounting pages verified: Accounting Dashboard, Chart of Accounts, Vouchers, Daybook, Trial Balance, Reports (P&L + Balance Sheet). Dual-view navigation working correctly with view switcher. Auto-bridge creates vouchers from transactions. Migration endpoint works.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/company returns company data with id, name, user_id
Backend: PUT /api/company updates company details (name, address, gstin, pan)
Backend: GET /api/account-groups returns 24+ default groups with nature (asset/liability/income/expense)
Backend: POST /api/account-groups creates a new group
Backend: GET /api/ledgers returns ledgers list
Backend: POST /api/ledgers creates a new ledger with opening balance
Backend: PUT /api/ledgers/{id} updates a ledger
Backend: DELETE /api/ledgers/{id} deletes a ledger without vouchers
Backend: DELETE /api/ledgers/{id} fails with 400 if vouchers exist
Backend: POST /api/vouchers creates a voucher with balanced entries (Dr=Cr)
Backend: POST /api/vouchers rejects unbalanced entries with 400 error
Backend: GET /api/vouchers returns list with type filter (payment, receipt, etc.)
Backend: DELETE /api/vouchers/{id} deletes a voucher
Backend: GET /api/trial-balance returns rows with ledger_id, ledger_name, debit, credit, is_balanced
Backend: GET /api/daybook returns vouchers with enriched ledger_name in entries
Backend: GET /api/profit-loss returns income, expenses, total_income, total_expenses, net_profit
Backend: GET /api/balance-sheet returns assets, liabilities, total_assets, total_liabilities, is_balanced
Backend: POST /api/migrate-to-accounting migrates existing transactions to vouchers
Backend: POST /api/transactions auto-creates voucher (auto-bridge)
Backend: All accounting endpoints require authentication (401 without auth)
Frontend: Finance Tracker view shows correct nav items (Dashboard, Accounts, Transactions, Upload, Categories, Settings)
Frontend: Accounting view shows correct nav items (Dashboard, Chart of Accounts, Vouchers, Daybook, Trial Balance, Reports, Settings)
Frontend: View switcher link toggles between Finance Tracker and Accounting views
Frontend: Accounting Dashboard shows company info, stats (groups, ledgers, vouchers, trial balance status), P&L summary, Trial Balance summary
Frontend: Chart of Accounts shows tree structure with 25 groups and 12 ledgers, nature badges, add ledger/group buttons
Frontend: Vouchers page shows 295 vouchers with type filters (All, Payment, Receipt, Journal, Contra, Sales, Purchase, Credit Note, Debit Note)
Frontend: Voucher create dialog has type select, date input, narration, reference, entries table with ledger/debit/credit
Frontend: Trial Balance page shows balanced totals (Dr=13,24,973, Cr=13,24,973) with date filters
Frontend: Reports page has P&L and Balance Sheet tabs
Frontend: P&L shows Income (₹12,31,548), Expenses (₹7,31,675.20), Net Profit (₹4,99,872.80)
Frontend: Balance Sheet shows Assets = Liabilities (₹4,99,872.80), Status: Balanced
Frontend: Daybook shows 295 journal entries with voucher details and ledger names
critical_code_review_comments: Auto-bridge from transactions to vouchers works but depends on ledger linking (linked_account_id). If no ledger is linked to the account, no voucher is created.
Trial balance may show unbalanced state during testing due to test voucher creation - this is expected behavior.
DialogContent accessibility warning should be addressed by adding aria-describedby or Description component.
seed_data_creation: Test ledgers and vouchers created with TEST_ prefix for testing. 295 vouchers auto-generated from transaction migration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 verified the new Tally-like double-entry accounting system: (1) Backend has full CRUD for Company, Account Groups, Ledgers, Vouchers. (2) Reports: Trial Balance, Daybook, P&L, Balance Sheet all working. (3) Auto-bridge creates vouchers when transactions are created (if ledger linking is configured). (4) Migration endpoint converts existing transactions to vouchers. (5) Frontend has 6 new pages under /accounting/* with dual-view navigation. (6) View switcher correctly toggles between Finance Tracker and Accounting views. (7) All vouchers show 'auto' badge if created via auto-bridge. (8) Delete ledger fails if vouchers exist (400 error).
notes: The accounting engine is fully functional with Indian Standard Chart of Accounts (24 default groups). Trial Balance shows balanced state (Dr=Cr). Balance Sheet correctly includes Net Profit in Liabilities side. P&L correctly calculates net profit from income and expense ledgers.
